city.locationHintDenied: Location access is off — you can still search or use the map.
city.locationHintUnavailable: Couldn't get your location — try search or the map.
city.locationHintTimeout: Location took too long — try again, or search.
city.locationHintUnsupported: Location isn't available here — try search or the map.
city.locationHintNoCity: No city found nearby — try search or the map.
